Text: At its meeting on 26 July 2019, the Committee, having been informed that the removal order against the complainants had become statute-barred on 16 February 2019 and that the complainants had filed a new asylum application in Sweden on 10 April 2019, decided to discontinue the examination of communication No. 906/2018. The decision of the Committee was taken on the understanding that the complainants would be entitled to submit a new communication to the Committee in the event of a renewed risk of forcible removal from the State party’s territory.
